span.p:
Init params: center_offset, step/base_step, Z_START/Z_NUM,
angle_propose_flag, num_ini_ang, wav_idx ranges

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Build wavelength pairs (w_pairs)
optionally pick single pair by wavIdx

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
